summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Avantis U.S. Small Cap Value ETF (AVUV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US small-cap value companies selected based on fundamental criteria. AVUV was launched on Sep 24, 2019 and is issued by American Century Investments.

holdings.infoBox: AVUV is an equity ETF with a total of 800 individual holdings. The top holdings are Matson stock at 1.10%, Viasat at 1.09%, Lantheus Holdings at 0.83%, Lear Corporation at 0.77%, and Avnet at 0.76%.
